test.fill_query: INSERT INTO sort_string_full SELECT randomPrintableASCII(rand() % 100 + 1) AS str_col FROM numbers(3000000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM sort_string_full ORDER BY str_col FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
SELECT * FROM sort_string_full ORDER BY str_col DESC FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_threads = {threads}
